reviews.review_description: I’ve only been playing this game for about an hour and a half doing the tutorial stuff and this game is already amazing. Not to mention the very friendly and helpful staff that popped in and helped me and a new player. Can’t wait to see what this game turns into in the future. 10/10 recommend if you want a ready player one vibe type of game or even if you’re just a fan of MMO’s.

reviews.review_title: All I can say is WOW!!
reviews.review_description: So immersive, by far the best MMORPG in vr I’ve experienced! Not like zenith or ilysia at all, you get the classic MMO feeling of freedom, diversity, and unlimited content. Good job guys!

Give it a real chance and you’ll like it for sure currently lvl 52 with almost 30 hours and no where near max level and daily events/ updates

Best game on meta store right now just amazing
My beta test is not downloading for me to join i have permission from freeland
So far this game is blowing my mind. It is feeling like the Oasis 100%

This game is genuinely one of the best games you can find, its a great implementation into quest headsets, it puts every game into one by including racing, fighting, exploring, and socially interacting with your friends!, Genuinely deserves a better rating. 🤝🏻

The concept of the game is great.. and if executed right it could break the market.... ready player one or FREE GUY, TYPE esthetic and I personally love that... THE POTENTIAL IS ENDLESS... 

BUT...... AND ITS A BIG ONE... THE GAME IS CHOPPY AND GRAPHICS ARE KINDA BAD WHICH TAKES AWAY FROM THE EXPERIENCE. LAGGY WORLD. AND CAN DEFINITELY HAVE A BETTER INTERFACE AND NAVIGATION SYSTEM... FIX THE GLITCHY CHOPPY GAMEPLAY.. AND YOU GOT YOURSELF ONE OF THE GREATEST GAMES ON THE STORE.. I PROMISE
I couldn’t do anything, My avatar was always crouching, my arms looked weird. Everything was just confusing. I know this game is free but I feel scammed.
Neat idea, looks terrible, boring very quickly.

reviews.review_title: Bad game I would give 0 stars
reviews.review_description:
I can't even get past the first part of the tutorial because of I think an invisible wall.

Either take it down or Finnish your game
Closest thing to that ready player one with its core game mechanics , it’s good game that definitely deserves  way better  graphics

I just installed the game, and I started it up, and I couldn't create an account because the menu button kept clicking by itself like the keyboard was erasing my letters and I couldn't leave the registration by clicking on the X button it keeps taking me back like I was being forced back to the registration menu?

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for reporting this, it seems like a very rare issue. We tested it in the new build and it's working great. Are you able to try again and if it works feel free to adjust the review. Thank you, the Freeland Team! Also if you need more support don't hesitate to join our Discord here: https://discord.gg/NVa42Yx

reviews.review_title: Good concept with very bad design
reviews.review_description:
When I first discovered this game I was excited. The initial login screen and displays show promise but as you dig deeper into the setup and eventually land in the starting lobby, it becomes painfully clear that there was very little consistency or good planning done for the look and the feel of the worlds within. I was going to give this game more of a chance and I probably will try it again but the initial experience and videos are very disappointing. 

The game has so much potential but the presentation is lackluster and incredibly primitive. And its current state may appeal to a younger crowd, but one would assume that you'd want this set of worlds or app to appeal to a general audience. If you want it to appeal to more people tone it down and develop some consistent design. It's too bright and too inconsistent in so many ways. Everything about it is distracting and creates psychological anxiety which is something you definitely do not want. 

The Avatar design alone is very off putting. Being able to randomize and customize is great but the base characters, avatars , designs need to be less off-putting. And consider a different approach to the clothing. The current setup leaves so much crashing geometry that it can be rather distracting and pull one out of what's supposed to be a virtual Galaxy.

The starting point should be more like an easily navigable spaceport or train station with portals to different locations easily accessible and readily visible. But everything doesn't need to look like a swirling rainbow of candy . That's disorienting it makes it difficult to focus on one thing. There should only be key points of interest things that shine and stand out all the rest of it should let those things stand out. The visual design needs to help guide the user. So the background elements the walls the floor the ceiling those things should frame the other things not overpower it.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are actually working on something like this and have been planning it for a long time. We are just taking our time to make sure we get it right! Feel free to jump in the game anytime as there is so much to explore and do, but we understand and appreciate your feedback. Also feel free to join our Discord anytime https://discord.gg/NVa42Yx  Best, Alex!

reviews.review_description:
I mean the game doesn't look great at all.
I would love an open world game but I have no idea what I'm doing here. Running around talking to npcs. The npc will tell me to go somewhere and I have no way of finding where that is. 
If you try to follow the red arrow on the map you won't find anything and if you lose sight of the orb ball thing you can't find where the objective is. 

You fight people just walking around for no reason at all doesn't feel like there's any point to it, you get coins to collect after the fight but that's it.

There isn't a clear tutorial at all. I can see boards telling me allll the stuff I can do but I have no idea how to do it? I don't even know how to get to another planet.

I can't go anywhere until I level up but finding an. Npc with a quest is hit and miss, then you have the problem of finding where to go on your quest. 

I like the concept of an open world especially space themed but honestly in the state it is in now, I'd say only children would play this. 

I'll keep checking back to see if it changes but I can't spend the little down time I have wondering around in this game not knowing what to do. Especially when there are soo many polished games sitting on my wish list. 

Also you really need to tone it down with the environment, not everything should be sooooo brightly coloured and distracting, only points of interest should be highlighted then I may actually be able to find where to go. Right now nothing catches your eye because it looks like the rainbow threw up. 

If you look at games like zenith you will see how it can be done. Open world MMO, great graphics. Just a suggestion. This looks worse than roblox graphics atm.
Good idea just not playable glitches everywhere
Tried to input a username name ui would not accept any input now uninstalled very disappointed Grrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrrr

reviews.review_title: Ready player one/ world of warcraft
reviews.review_description: Found this game completely by accident while looking for something multiplayer to play with my daughters and son-in-law.  It is absolutely amazing. Brings the mmo aspect of the greats like wow and everquest and brings the feel of ready player one in VR.  I have a feeling that my time is going to be speant living in this world when i am not at work. I have met several moderators and key people involved with this game and everyone of them has been extremely helpful in showing how things work.  I know it is still in early stages and i cannot wait to see how things get fleshed out in updates and full release. I have been spreading word of this to everyone i can that i know would enjoy it as I do.  Definitely will be supporting this game however i can. Hopefully we will see world become populated with lots of people. Keep up great work devs you won me over.
The starting arrow kept pointing me to the void I was stuck in there for so long I ended up giving up fix your game I couldn't even find the way to play because the arrow keep deleting to the void

Alex

reviews.review_title: Buy this free game right now
reviews.review_description: This game is so amazing and just what I've been looking for when I've been getting bored of all the other games you can customize your own avatar then run around an entire galaxy with friends flying spaceships or riding dragons and you can fit anything in your pockets like in a certain popular movie definitely can't wait to see how this turns out and I'm getting all my friends to play

Whether I tried to use the magic, it didn't work at all. I read the instructions, it just didn't work and the graphics were bad and you could barely see anything and it wouldn't tell you how much gold there was you had

reviews.review_description: FreelandVR is a game that keeps getting better the more you play it. Leveling up to finally ride your own dragon is an absolute thrill and the uniqueness of each world is truly amazing and utterly engaging. The vast landscapes you can explore are breathtaking - entering buildings with halls soaring 10-15 stories high will blow your mind. Even though it's still in early release, I'm excited to see how this game will grow and be shaped by players like us.

I backed this game on Kickstarter and have been testing the game for two years. I know every inch of every map and let me tell you you have a huge amount of content to explore. Some days I would focus on quests, other days I would just ride my horse over the hills in Haeyanna. Sneaking past enemies or running straight at them to fight. The choice is yours. I'm looking forward to helping new players enjoy the game I've lived in the past two years. Nothing is impossible.

As the game currently sits, it looks and plays like a bunch of high school graduates got ahold of some basic Unity designer tools and made the skeleton of a game, and the released it as a finished product.  The graphics are horribly polygonal and almost offensive to the eyes.  The game is rife with game-ending bugs and the graphics lag so bad on even the best headsets.  Honestly, it feels like the devs are trying to replace Vrchat, but failed horribly.  There is absolutely zero reason or incentive to play this game as its just a low res and broken clone of Vrchat or even Horizon Worlds.  I mean, you know a game is struggling when just after they release they publicly complain about financial issues, how no one will invest in them, and that they need to crowd fund to stay afloat.

I'd like to be able to write a considered review of this game but sadly, I am unable to because I can't actually play it. Apparently, the entire game is a PvP zone and I was attacked and killed by hostile players while speaking to a quest giver for my first actual quest. No battle tutorial. No orientation. Just instant death. I can't even get a quest without being set upon by hostile players. There's no way for me to progress or play because of that. 

What a shame. This game looked like it had real promise.

developer_response.body:
Hey, we're really sorry you had this experience! 

The starting area is not a red zone (PVP Zone) but the enemies can sometimes run close to the quest giver. 

Rest assured we are rebuilding the start area and it will soon be updated. 

Thank you so much for playing Freeland.

Best regards,
The Freeland Team

reviews.review_description: Freeland is a world so immersive you have a plethora of options to be who you desire to be! Whether you want to be a swordsman, a spellcaster, a space pilot, a hunter, or simply wish to uncover the secrets of a world so unlike our, ALL are possible! I've had great fun playing during its rocky phases and I can't wait to see how this evolves into a dream like new world!

Having a great time exploring. There seems to be a lot to do and I've only just begun to scratch the surface. Sure, some bits could do with a little more love, like the avatar creator and some NPC's but what there is is fine for now. There are not too many VR MMO's worthy of your time, but I think this one is. I'm looking forward to it's progress and growth.

This game is absolutely massive and has tons of potential.  I've been streaming this for a few weeks pre-release, and it's been super fun, but I've barely even scratched the surface off it.  Pre-release, there were 4 massive planets to explore with an additional 3 planets planned post release and more to come still.  Each planet feels unique with its own style and theme.  While the game isn't always the prettiest, beyond the visuals, the potential is impressive.  UI works very well and the mechanics are pretty solid.  Overall this is a super fun game with so much potential!  Check out some of my live streams by searching for Resol VR on youtube.

reviews.review_title: good start to a nice vr mmo
reviews.review_description: EPIC mounts.. the games a tad bit laggy and sometimes you might encounter a bug or 2 but its a nice start :) 5 stars.. its free, and its a vr mmo weve all been wanting an active vr mmo this is the only one now that zenith is gone and orbus is kinda dead.

I’m a new VR player and just happened to see Freeland on YouTube. I’ve been in the Discord, and although the game has some bugs (which is to be expected), the developers respond quickly to everyone’s concerns and issues. I’ll definitely have to play some more, but overall, I really love the game! There are tons of nice people, awesome quests, and unique items you can get. I definitely recommend it to anyone who loves a wide variety of activities in games.

Beautiful worlds, great community, active devs that actually respond to player feedback and spend time with their players. What more can you ask for? There is so much to do in this game, pick a direction and if you don't like it change things on the fly. No class restrictions holding you back.

This game has the potential to be the vrmmo that mmo players have wanted since vr came out. I have only played for 2 days and I'm already hooked! I'm looking forward to what the developers have in store!
So much freaking fun running around with my friends fighting ninjas and stumbling into other travelers to join up with us. It seems like there’s a lot to explore too.
Keeps crashing on me I go through the portal in the beginning and it kicks me back out to log in. Looks fun tho

reviews.review_description: Freeland is still in it's growing stages, but with the drive of it's dev team it has a bright future. If you like shooting guns, swinging swords and shooting firedballs while riding a dragon over a race track, this is a great game to check out.

reviews.review_title: What VR was made for! Magical experience
reviews.review_description: Imagination brought to VR so much detail and though and effort was made into this game and community. With the variety of worlds, items, and quests, it's easy to get lost in the sheer size of this amazing experience. Thank you, and please play this experience.

I kind of knew what to expect in a way but when I loaded into the game I was caught off guard by everything. I legit spent most of the time wandering around and exploring. Met some nice people and went on a tour and saw some things that I’m hyped to try out next time. 

I’m always looking for new games that gives me access to everything that I love about vr and so far this game def has it. 

I rode a dragon, fought some ninjas and more. Very cool game.  Hyped to see what else is coming. Highly recommend it.
I really like this game I spend 4 hours in one day but the game is really buggy
Love this game. Can't wait for updates.
Feels like a fever dream that hasn't had a quality of life update since 1996

I downloaded and installed this game about an hour ago and can already say I'm very impressed. In the short time I played this game I have already met a few ppl who helped me get started and were super friendly. The graphics are great,game play and controls are smooth. Can't wait to see what's more in this game.
